arts.ttl: Villa chief confirms interest in Félix, Asensio
arts.sum: João Félix and Marco Asensio are candidates to join Aston Villa in this transfer window, according to Monchi, the club's president of football operations.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa v Celtic police update as more than 20 arrested and video shows clash in stands
arts.sum: On the arrests, West Midlands Police Supt Jack Hadley said: “We welcomed Celtic fans to Birmingham for the Champions League game against Aston Villa. Nineteen of the 21 arrests at Villa Park were Celtic fans, police said.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer state of play: Felix confirmation, Asensio talks, Danso approach and Watkins truth
arts.sum: Emery has a long-standing interest in Joao Felix as Villa have tried to sign the Portuguese in several previous transfer windows, while Marco Asensio is also managed by super agent Jorge Mendes and has been the subject of talks between Villa and PSG. So far, Monchi has signed two players for Unai Emery’s first-team as Donyell Malen and Andres Garcia were recruited at a cost of £26m combined.

arts.ttl: Jhon Duran's eye-watering Al-Nassr salary as Monchi confirms two Aston Villa transfer targets
arts.sum: Monchi also confirmed that there remains an interest in pair Joao Felix and Marco Asensio, players Villa have sought to bring to the West Midlands on multiple occasions before now, and deals with Chelsea and PSG respectively they're looking to conclude before Monday night's transfer deadline if the numbers work. Aston Villa's president of football operations Monchi has said that the offer proposed to the club for Jhon Duran was simply too significant to reject, as they prepare to allow the Colombian striker to join Al-Nassr in the Saudi Pro League.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Evan Ferguson to Everton, Kaoru Mitoma to Al-Nassr, Marco Asensio to Aston Villa
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Evan Ferguson to Everton, Kaoru Mitoma to Al-Nassr and Marco Asensio to Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: ‘Radical change’ needed for player to join Aston Villa – Feels like face-saving operation
arts.sum: Unai Emery and Aston Villa may be set for more transfer disappointment in their search for a defender as Juan Foyth appears likely to remain at Villarreal. That’s according to Estadio Deportivo, who report that the defender will not leave and will remain in La Liga until the end of the season. They say that The post ‘Radical change’ needed for player to join Aston Villa – Feels like face-saving operation appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Aston Villa CONFIRM Joao Felix interest
arts.sum: Aston Villa have confirmed their interest in Chelsea forward Joao Felix as they look to sign a replacement for Jhon Duran. Felix, who joined Chelsea from Atletico Madrid last summer, has emerged as a key target for Unai Emery’s side, and The Transfers Podcast understands that he is eager to leave Stamford Bridge amid his lack of game time in west London .

arts.ttl: Exclusive: West Ham and Wolves both wanted to sign PL winner who Jurgen Klopp called a 'pressing machine'
arts.sum: But he wants to join another club

After a bright start under Vitor Pereira, Wolves have now failed to win in five, and have lost their last four. The welcome of rivals Aston Villa is the perfect chance to correct their current form. ...

arts.ttl: Monchi reveals figures of Jhon Durán transfer – “Incredible economic leap” for Aston Villa and player
arts.sum: Aston Villa director Monchi has explained it was difficult for the club to reject an offer for Jhon Durán. The Villans official has been speaking to the Spanish media and talked about the striker. AS have relayed his comments.
